Issues: While the image is highly stylized and does not appear to replicate specific copyrighted logos or characters, the juxtaposition of a recognizable cultural setting (Tokyo/Japan canals) with highly generalized architecture may lead to customer requests for licensing restrictions regarding the geographical use or theme.

From a print quality standpoint, the contrast between the deep shadows and the hyper-saturated reflections in the water is so strong that it risks appearing slightly artificial or 'cartoonish' when scaled up to large formats, requiring careful color profiling.

There is an inconsistency in the depicted urban scale; the modern skyscrapers are depicted as extremely clean and minimalist, contrasting sharply with the rustic, layered textures of the traditional wooden structures. While this contrast is a strong artistic choice, refining the overall 'finish' would improve the cohesive realism.
